content.cn_text: 练习一。
content.en_text: Practice 1.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一场关于野生动物状况的讲座，尤其是关于野猪。
content.en_text: You will hear a lecture about the situation of wild animals, especially wild boar.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看第1至第10题。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions 1 to 10.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第1至第10题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 1 to 10.

content.cn_text: 早上好。我叫 Jim Robinson，今天我们将探讨野生动物的控制问题，尤其是野猪。
content.en_text: Good morning. My name is Jim Robinson and today we're going to look at the control of wild animals, specifically wild boar.

content.cn_text: 野猪数千年来一直是西欧的自然居民，但近年来野猪活动激增，带来了真正的威胁。
content.en_text: Now, boar have been natural inhabitants of western Europe for thousands of years, but in recent years there has been a surge in boar activity that poses real threats.

content.cn_text: 野猪目前不在受保护动物名单上，这也许就是它们繁殖活动激增的原因。
content.en_text: Boars are not currently on the protected animals list, which is perhaps why there has been a spike in their breeding activity.

content.cn_text: 野猪是本土物种，在法国乡村和德国巴伐利亚高地尤其多。
content.en_text: Boars are an indigenous species and are particularly plentiful in rural France and the Bavarian uplands of Germany.

content.cn_text: 猎野猪是欧洲传统，可以追溯到罗马时期，并在中世纪的宫廷人员中尤其流行。
content.en_text: Boar hunting is a European tradition that goes back to Roman times and became particularly popular among courtiers during the Middle Ages.

content.cn_text: 即使在20世纪，猎野猪也被视为乡村生活的重要组成部分。
content.en_text: Even during the 20th century, boar hunting was seen as an integral part of rural life.

content.cn_text: 猎野猪活动的减少显然导致欧洲野猪数量上升，情况已经达到关键点，野猪对环境构成严重威胁。
content.en_text: The decline in boar hunting has obviously led to a rise in the boar populations of Europe and the situation has reached a critical point with boar posing a critical threat to the environment.

content.cn_text: 支持猎野猪的人将这一因素视为应该控制野猪数量的主要原因。
content.en_text: Proponents of boar hunting cite this factor as a major reason why boar populations should be contained.

content.cn_text: 野猪也对人类构成威胁，有无数关于人们在野猪袭击中受伤的报告。
content.en_text: Boar also pose a threat to humans too, with countless reports of people being injured during boar attacks.

content.cn_text: 野猪的起源与日耳曼地区有关，这或许解释了它们在德国的普遍存在。
content.en_text: The origins of the wild boar have roots in Germanic and this perhaps explains their prevalence in Germany.

content.cn_text: 德国野猪数量问题会影响欧洲其他地区，因为野猪群会向中欧和东欧迁移。
content.en_text: The problems with the boar population in Germany have ramifications for the rest of Europe, as boar packs migrate towards central and eastern Europe.

content.cn_text: 一个主要令人担忧的问题是疾病传播，这些疾病会感染其他物种。
content.en_text: One of the main issues that is of great concern is the transmission of diseases that infect other species.

content.cn_text: 法国奶农尤其担心，因为许多人已经看到自己的牲畜群因感染而减少。
content.en_text: Dairy farmers in France are particularly concerned as many of them have seen their herds depleted by infections.

content.cn_text: 控制野猪数量的方法已经被详细研究，并且有许多可选方案。
content.en_text: The methods for containing boar populations have been looked at in great detail and numerous options are available.

content.cn_text: 一种方法是鼓励在山区和森林等野外地区进行更多猎野猪活动。
content.en_text: One is to encourage more boar hunting in wild regions, such as mountains and forests.

content.cn_text: 猎人会获得狩猎许可证，可以为了食物或运动而狩猎。
content.en_text: Hunters would be given licenses to hunt, either for food or sports.

content.cn_text: 当然，野猪确实会威胁人类生命，所以这种可能性必须谨慎看待。
content.en_text: Of course, boar do pose a threat to human life, so this possibility must be looked at with caution.

content.cn_text: 一种必须排除的方法是毒药，因为已经出台法律禁止这种做法。
content.en_text: One method that must be ruled out is poison, as legislation has been introduced prohibiting this.

content.cn_text: 这类方法曾在20世纪60年代用于兔子身上，并对食物链造成灾难性影响。
content.en_text: Such methods were tried with rabbits in the 1960s and this had a disastrous impact on the food chain.

content.cn_text: 将自然捕食者引入生态系统也是一种不能考虑的选择。
content.en_text: The introduction of natural predators into the ecosystem is also an option that can't be considered.

content.cn_text: 世界上已知的野猪捕食者只有狮子、老虎等野生猫科动物。
content.en_text: The only known predators of boar in the world are wild cats, like lions and tigers.

content.cn_text: 显然，不可能允许这些动物在欧洲的山地和森林中游荡。
content.en_text: Obviously, there's no way such animals can be allowed to roam the mountains and forests of Europe.

content.cn_text: 鉴于野猪对人类构成威胁，必须确保生活在森林中的野猪远离城市居民。
content.en_text: Given the threat that boars pose to humans, it is imperative that forest-dwelling boar are kept well away from people in cities.

content.cn_text: 这绝对必要，因为人类安全必须是政策制定者的首要任务。
content.en_text: This is absolutely essential as human safety must be the main priority of policymakers.

content.cn_text: 到11世纪，几个欧洲国家的野猪数量减少，在英国也变得越来越稀少。
content.en_text: By the 11th century, boars in several European countries were becoming increasingly rare in Great Britain.

content.cn_text: 查尔斯国王曾试图在英国的新森林地区重新引入野猪，
content.en_text: King Charles attempted to reintroduce boars in the New Forest area of the country,

content.cn_text: 然而在英国内战期间，整个野猪种群几乎被消灭，
content.en_text: yet the entire population was almost wiped out during the battles of the English Civil War,

content.cn_text: 因为四处流动的士兵为了食物猎杀它们。
content.en_text: when roaming soldiers hunted them for food.

content.cn_text: 20世纪80年代，野猪养殖受到鼓励，野猪数量又开始上升。
content.en_text: During the 1980s, wild boar rearing was encouraged and boar populations began to rise again.

content.cn_text: 到20世纪90年代，英格兰各地野猪数量大幅上升，
content.en_text: By the 1990s, there was a huge rise in the number of boar across England,

content.cn_text: 很大程度上是因为这个物种不再被迫圈养。
content.en_text: to a large part to the species no longer forced to live in captivity.

content.cn_text: 许多野猪从英格兰各地的农场逃脱，并以很快的速度繁殖。
content.en_text: Many boar have broken free from farms across England and are breeding at a rapid rate.

content.cn_text: 除了环境威胁之外，野猪也给种植作物和蔬菜的农民带来问题。
content.en_text: Aside from their environmental threats, boars also pose a problem for farmers growing crops and vegetables.

content.cn_text: 其他物种，如赤鹿，也会威胁谷物和土豆等农产品，
content.en_text: Other species such as red deer are a threat to farm produce like grain and potatoes,

content.cn_text: 但野猪无疑构成最严重的风险。
content.en_text: but boars certainly present the most serious risk.

content.cn_text: 它们对农业造成的损害估计会导致数百万英镑的保险赔付，
content.en_text: The damage done to the farming industry is estimated to cost millions of pounds in insurance payments,

content.cn_text: 因此过去十年保险赔付大幅增加。
content.en_text: as a result of this have spiked in the last decade.

content.cn_text: 赤鹿主要局限在森林地区，夏季很少在栖息地外看到它们。
content.en_text: Red deer are predominantly confined to forest areas, and it is unusual to see them outside their habitats during the summer months.

content.cn_text: 然而，随着天气变冷，人们可以看到它们在当地村庄和田地周围寻找食物。
content.en_text: However, as the weather gets colder, they can be seen looking for food around local villages and fields.

content.cn_text: 赤鹿起源于亚洲，是一种反刍动物，
content.en_text: Red deer have their origins in Asia and are a ruminant species,

content.cn_text: 这意味着它们像牛一样有由四个腔室组成的胃。
content.en_text: which means they have a stomach that consists of four compartments much like cows.

content.cn_text: 它们会被宰杀作为食物，其肉被作为鹿肉出售，并越来越受消费者欢迎。
content.en_text: They are slaughtered for food and their meat is sold as venison and is increasingly popular among consumers.

content.cn_text: 赤鹿有九个亚种，其中三个在濒危物种名单上。
content.en_text: There are nine subspecies of red deer, with three of them on the endangered species list.

content.cn_text: 鹿群不像野猪群那样构成同等威胁，但确实需要被处理。
content.en_text: The deer population doesn't pose the same threat as the boar population, but it certainly needs to be addressed.

content.cn_text: 森林地区是它们的主要栖息地，而且现在它们的繁殖速度比往年高得多。
content.en_text: Forest areas are their main habitats, and they are now breeding at a much higher rate than in previous years.

content.cn_text: 当然，鹿是食物链的重要组成部分，也是英国狩猎传统的重要组成部分，
content.en_text: Of course, deer are an important part of the food chain and are an important part of the hunting traditions of the UK,

content.cn_text: 因此出于这个原因，保持它们数量稳定很重要。
content.en_text: so it is important that their population is kept stable for this reason.

content.cn_text: 不过真正令人担忧的是鹿给农民带来的问题，农民们看到自己的作物遭受毁灭性破坏。
content.en_text: Though the real concern is the problems that deer present for farmers who have seen their crops suffer in devastating ways.

content.cn_text: 需要提供保护，许多农民报告说，他们在田地周围建造大型围栏来阻止鹿进入，
content.en_text: Protection needs to be offered, and many farmers report building large perimeter fences around their fields to keep deer out,

content.cn_text: 这花费了他们大量金钱。
content.en_text: which cost them a huge amount of money.

content.cn_text: 到目前为止，政府资金不足以提供农民所需的保护，
content.en_text: Government funding is so far inadequate to offer the protection farmers need,

content.cn_text: 但人们正在研究通过其他方式提供补贴。
content.en_text: but ways are being looked at to provide subsidies through other means.

content.cn_text: 练习一到此结束。
content.en_text: That is the end of practice one.

content.cn_text: 现在你有半分钟检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 31-40

items.title: Boar is not a 31. __________ species.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第31题问野猪不是一种什么物种。原文说 Boars are not currently on the protected animals list，所以答案是 Protected。

items.title: Their number should be controlled as a result of their damage to the 32. __________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第32题问由于野猪对什么造成破坏，它们的数量应被控制。原文说 boar posing a critical threat to the environment，所以答案是 Environment。

items.title: They also spread 33. __________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第33题问野猪还会传播什么。原文说 transmission of diseases that infect other species，所以答案是 Diseases。

items.title: Law was passed regarding banning use of 34. __________ in killing boars.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第34题问法律禁止使用什么来杀死野猪。原文说 one method that must be ruled out is poison, as legislation prohibits this，所以答案是 Poison。

items.title: Measures should be taken to keep the boars in the 35. __________ away from people in urban areas.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第35题问应采取措施让哪里的野猪远离城市人口。原文说 forest-dwelling boar are kept well away from people in cities，所以答案是 Forest。

items.title: The early 1990s witnessed a significant population rise of boars due to their escape from 36. __________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第36题问20世纪90年代初野猪数量显著上升，是因为它们从哪里逃出。原文说 broken free from farms across England，所以答案是 Farms。

items.title: Red deer can also damage agricultural produce, such as grain and 37. __________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第37题问赤鹿也会破坏谷物和什么农产品。原文说 farm produce like grain and potatoes，所以答案是 Potatoes。

items.title: In winter the red deer come out to the villages for 38. __________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第38题问冬天赤鹿到村庄寻找什么。原文说 looking for food around local villages and fields，所以答案是 Food。

items.title: The number of deer keep stable for 39. __________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第39题问鹿的数量因为什么需要保持稳定。原文说 deer are an important part of the hunting traditions of the UK，所以答案是 Hunting。

items.title: Deer can have a devastating effect on the local 40. __________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第40题问鹿会对当地什么造成毁灭性影响。原文说 farmers have seen their crops suffer in devastating ways，所以答案是 Crops。
